packageSummary:
**Summary:** The 'Enchanting Saudi Arabia with Oman' package is a 9-day tour covering Riyadh, Jeddah, Muscat, and Jebel Akhdar. The itinerary includes visits to the Masmak Fort, Old Jeddah, Grand Mosque, Muttrah Souq, Al Alam Palace, Bait Al Zubair Museum, Dolphin Watching, and Jebel Akhdar. Participants will enjoy guided tours, sightseeing, and cultural experiences.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Riyadh
- Arrive in Riyadh and get transferred to your hotel.
- Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure and do a little bit of exploring on your own.

**Day 2:** Riyadh
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Proceed into old Riyadh, starting in the downtown area, visiting the traditional Dirah Souq and the Masmak Fort.
- Rest Day free for leisure.

**Day 3:** Jeddah
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Transfer to Riyadh airport for your flights to Jeddah.
- Arrival in Jeddah. After visa and immigration formalities our representative will meet and escort the guests to their air-conditioned vehicle for their transfer to the hotel.

**Day 4:** Jeddah
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Today start our tour by visiting the Old Jeddah. Our guide will tell you the amazing stories about Jeddah and its surroundings.
- Visit the Old Market hidden gems, Old Jeddah hidden galleries, local Jeddah food only for locals…

**Day 5:** Muscat
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Proceed to airport for Flight to Muscat.
- Arrival in Muscat. After Immigration clearance, baggage collection & customs proceed to the arrival hall to meet the chauffeur and proceed to the Hotel.

**Day 6:** Muscat
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Morning proceed to visit the Grand Mosque (not possible on Friday & other public holidays), highlight of the Muscat city.
- Drive along the waterfront Corniche visiting the colorful Muttrah Souq.
- Proceed for a photo stop to the magnificent Al Alam Palace, official palace of His Majesty Sultan Qaboos flanked by the 16th century Portuguese forts Mirani & Jalali.
- Visit Bait Al Zubair Museum to have a glimpse of Oman’s history.

**Day 7:** Muscat
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Transfer from the Muscat hotel to the Marina to embark on a boat as we search the seas for Dolphins and Whales.
- Watching wild dolphins is a thrilling way to start the day and the lucky may even come across one of the many species of whales that can be found just a few kilometers from Muscat’s rugged coast.

**Day 8:** Jebel Akhdar
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Proceed to Nizwa, capital of the interior, is the birthplace of Islam in the Sultanate of Oman.
- Nizwa boasts of the famous Round Tower Fort (photo stop), built in the 17th century, and its Souq renowned for its Friday cattle auction, intricately hand-carved “Khanjars” (daggers) & ornamental silver jewellery.
- We proceed to Wadi Al Madeen where there is a check post. From here a 36 km stretch of winding road takes one to Jebel Akhdar (2000 mts above sea level) the green jewel of the Al Hajjar mountain ranges, a truly unique spot in the Arabian Peninsula.

**Day 9:** Muscat
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Al Jebel Al Akhdar is famed for its fruit orchards typically laid out terrace style along the slopes of mountains, which are endowed with natural springs and aflaj.
- The villages of Saiq, Wadi Bani Habib (the village of the old houses) visit to village roose & Al Ain dot the landscape.
- The villages overlook a spectacular landscape of dramatic peaks, gorges and wadis.
- The roses of Jabal Al Akhdar fill the air with fragrance when in full bloom (March / April).
- Rose water is distilled in the homes of the villagers.
- Later you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Wonders of Kenya and Tanzania' package is a 9-day tour covering Nairobi, Masai Mara, Serengeti, and Ngorongoro. The itinerary includes visits to the world-famous Masai Mara Game Reserve, Serengeti National Park, and Ngorongoro Conservation Area. Participants will enjoy game-viewing drives, guided tours, and visits to local markets and villages. The tour also includes a visit to the Ngorongoro Crater, one of the largest unbroken calderas in the world.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Nairobi
- Meet Tour Manager / Station Manager outside the airport.
- Proceed for dinner and check-in at the hotel.
- Guided tour of Nairobi: See the city's main attractions, including the National Museum and the Kenyatta International Conference Centre.

**Day 2:** Nairobi - Mara Game Reserve
- Drive to the world-famous Masai Mara Game Reserve via the Great Rift Valley.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the reserve: See the Big Five, including lions, elephants, buffalo, and more.

**Day 3:** Mara Game Reserve
- Proceed on a full-day game-viewing drive with picnic lunch to search for the myriad species of game that make this reserve their home.
- Enjoy a sumptuous dinner at the lodge.

**Day 4:** Maasai Mara - Serengeti
- Drive to the Serengeti National Park in Tanzania.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the park: See the Big Five, including lions, elephants, buffalo, and more.

**Day 5:** Serengeti
- Proceed on a full-day game-viewing drive with picnic lunch to search for the myriad species of game that make this reserve their home.
- Enjoy a delicious dinner at the lodge.

**Day 6:** Serengeti - Ngorongoro
- Drive to the Ngorongoro Conservation Area.
- Enjoy a guided tour of the crater: See the Big Five, including lions, elephants, buffalo, and more.

**Day 7:** Ngorongoro
- Proceed on a full-day crater tour with packed lunch to search for the myriad species of game that make this reserve their home.
- Enjoy a sumptuous dinner at the lodge.

**Day 8:** Ngorongoro - Nairobi
- Drive back to Nairobi.
- Enjoy a farewell dinner at the hotel.

**Day 9:** Depart Nairobi
- Early breakfast, check out and depart to Jomo Kenyatta International Airport Nairobi where you will be dropped off in the afternoon for the departure flight in the evening.

**Summary:** The 'Majestic Saudi Arabia with Dubai' package is a 9-day tour covering Riyadh, Jeddah, and Dubai. The itinerary includes visits to the Masmak Fort, Dirah Souq, and Old Jeddah, as well as a desert safari in Dubai, a visit to the Burj Khalifa, and a tour of Abu Dhabi. Participants will enjoy guided tours, dhow cruises, and visits to microbreweries and porcelain factories.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Riyadh
- Arrive in Riyadh and get transferred to your hotel.
- Check in to your hotel and freshen up.
- Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure and do a little bit of exploring on your own.

**Day 2:** Riyadh
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Proceed into old Riyadh, starting in the downtown area, visiting the traditional Dirah Souq.
- Visit the Masmak Fort, which is just walking distance from the Old Souq.

**Day 3:** Jeddah
- Transfer to Riyadh airport for your flights to Jeddah.
- Arrival in Jeddah. After visa and immigration formalities our representative will meet and escort the guests to their air-conditioned vehicle for their transfer to the hotel.

**Day 4:** Jeddah
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Today start our tour by visiting the Old Jeddah. Our guide will tell you the amazing stories about Jeddah and its surroundings.
- Visit the Baghdadi house and the Ukash Mosque.

**Day 5:** Dubai
- Welcome to Dubai – famous for the record-breaking Burj Khalifa, Dubai Mall, and the Palm, its vibrant culture, turbulent history, modern infrastructure, huge aquariums, and indoor ski slopes.
- Upon arrival at the airport, pick up from the airport and transfer to your hotel.
- Check in at the hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.)
- Later we visit the Marina Dhow Cruise.

**Day 6:** Dubai
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Explore Dubai by going on a half-day tour around the famous cosmopolitan city.
- See city's most popular attractions such as the Burj Al Arab Hotel, the Palm Islands, and the Dubai Creek.
- Marvel at what Dubai has to offer, especially the wonderful interiors and massive library collection of the Blue Mosque.

**Day 7:** Dubai
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Visit the Dubai Frame! This towering structure was designed to link the UAE’s past and its thriving present.
- Travel back in time and hear how the city transformed from a humble fishing village to a modern metropolis
- Later, in the evening desert safari in Dubai is one of the most memorable experiences that you can have in this vibrant city.

**Day 8:** Abu Dhabi
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- The Abu Dhabi City Tour is a fascinating journey through the capital city of the United Arab Emirates.
- Explore the unique blend of modernity and tradition in Abu Dhabi, which is home to some of the world’s most iconic architectural wonders.
- See some of the most popular attractions such as the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, the Emirates Palace Hotel, etc.

**Day 9:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home.

**Summary:** The 'Kenyan Pride' package is a 7-day tour that takes you through the beautiful landscapes and wildlife of Kenya. The itinerary includes visits to Nairobi, Aberdare, Lake Naivasha, and Masai Mara, where you will experience the thrill of game drives, boat cruises, and nature walks. Enjoy the scenic views of the Great Rift Valley, visit the famous Hell's Gate National Park, and get up close and personal with the majestic wildlife of Kenya. This tour is perfect for nature lovers and adventure seekers who want to experience the best of Kenya's natural beauty.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Nairobi
- Arrive at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport and meet your representative.
- Transfer to your hotel and check-in.
- Spend the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2:** Aberdare
- Drive to Aberdare Country Club and enjoy a guided tour.
- Visit the Thompson’s Falls and enjoy a nature walk.

**Day 3:** Lake Naivasha
- Drive to Lake Naivasha and enjoy a boat cruise.
- Visit the Crescent Island and enjoy a hike.

**Day 4:** Lake Naivasha
- Enjoy a game drive in Hell’s Gate National Park.
- Visit the park's scenic views and get up close and personal with the wildlife.

**Day 5:** Masai Mara
- Drive to Masai Mara and enjoy a game drive.
- Visit the park's scenic views and get up close and personal with the wildlife.

**Day 6:** Masai Mara
- Enjoy a morning game drive and a picnic lunch.
- Visit the park's scenic views and get up close and personal with the wildlife.

**Day 7:** Departure from Nairobi
- Depart from Masai Mara to Nairobi Airport.
- End of the tour.

**Inclusions:**

- Accommodation in Nairobi, Aberdare, Lake Naivasha, and Masai Mara.
- Daily Buffet Breakfast except on Day 1.
- 6 Dinners included as per itinerary.
- 5 Lunches included as per itinerary.
- Private transportation in a Customised 4WD Safari Landcruiser (non-ac) with pop-up roof for easy game viewing & photography.
- Services of an experienced English-speaking driver-guide.
- Game viewing drives as indicated in the itinerary.
- All Government taxes, parks entrance fees and levies as per itinerary.
- All meet and greet services.
- All arrival and departure transfers as per itinerary.
- Overseas Travel Insurance (up to 60 yrs age group only).

**Exclusions:**

- International air ticket, Domestic ticket if any, Airport taxes & Visa charges.
- TCS and GST is not included in the above cost and will be charged on final amount.
- Meals other than those specified (if any).
- Laundry, telephone, optional excursions and other items of a personal nature.
- Mandatory tipping to Guide/ driver of USD 10 per person per day is not included in the price.
- City taxes / Resort Fees – To be paid at the hotel.
- Cost of foreign exchange for personal use.
- Cost of PCR Test is not included & any medical examination will be treated as actual.
- Any items or services not specified in the itinerary ‘INCLUSIONS’ head.

**Summary:** The 'Marvellous Saudi Arabia with Abu Dhabi' package is an 8-day tour covering Riyadh, Jeddah, and Abu Dhabi. The itinerary includes visits to the Old Jeddah, Al-Balad, Baghdadi house, Jeddah Corniche, Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, and BAPS Temple, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, city visits, and experiences of the local culture and lifestyle. 

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Welcome to Riyadh
- Arrive in Riyadh and get transferred to your hotel.
- Check in to your hotel and freshen up.
- Enjoy the rest of the day at leisure and do a little bit of exploring on your own.

**Day 2:** Riyadh
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Welcome to Saudi Arabia, famous for oil, to be the origin of Islam, Arabian horses, the world's largest sand desert (Rub' Al Khali), the world's largest oasis (Al-Ahsa) and much more.
- Rest Day free for leisure.

**Day 3:** Jeddah
- Transfer to Riyadh airport for your flights to Jeddah.
- Arrival in Jeddah. After visa and immigration formalities our representative will meet and escort the guests to their air-conditioned vehicle for their transfer to the hotel.

**Day 4:** Jeddah
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- Today start our tour by visiting the Old Jeddah. Our guide will tell you the amazing stories about Jeddah and its surroundings.
- We will enjoy a wonderful walk in Al-Balad, the old part of the city. This walking tour of the old Town will take you along all the less known must-see local spots: Old Market hidden gems, Old Jeddah hidden galleries, local Jeddah food only for locals…

**Day 5:** Abu Dhabi
- Welcome to Abu Dhabi – famous for its stunning islands and record-breaking theme parks such as Ferrari World Abu Dhabi and Yas Water world Abu Dhabi.
- Upon arrival at the airport, pick up from the airport and transfer to your hotel. Check in at the hotel (standard time approx. 1400 hrs.).

**Day 6:** Abu Dhabi
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel.
- The Abu Dhabi City Tour is a fascinating journey through the capital city of the United Arab Emirates.
- Explore the unique blend of modernity and tradition in Abu Dhabi, which is home to some of the world’s most iconic architectural wonders.
- See some of the most popular attractions such as the Sheikh Zayed Grand Mosque, the Emirates Palace Hotel, etc.

**Day 7:** Abu Dhabi
- Enjoy Breakfast at Hotel
- You can choose optional between Ferrari World OR Warner Bros. OR Water world OR Sea World.

**Day 8:** Departure
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to the airport for your flight back home to India.

**Summary:** The 'Trending Japan' package is a 7-day tour covering Narita, Tokyo, Hamamatsu, and Osaka. The itinerary includes visits to Asakusa Kannon Temple, Tokyo Skytree, Mount Fuji, Lake Ashi Cruise, Komagatake Ropeway, Mount Fuji 5th Station, Nara & Deer Park, Todaiji Temple, Shinsaibashi, Kinkakuji Temple, Arashiyama Bamboo Forest, Fushimi Inari Shrine, Miyajima Island, Itsukushima Shrine, and Peace Memorial Park and Museum, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, bullet train experiences, and visits to local markets and shopping streets.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Narita
- Arrive at Narita airport and transfer to the hotel by Shuttle Bus (SIC Basis)
- Check-in at the hotel and spend the rest of the day at leisure

**Day 2:** Tokyo
- Visit Asakusa Kannon Temple & Nakamise Dori Street
- Visit Tokyo Skytree (350 m)
- Free Time at Ginza
- Visit Team Labs

**Day 3:** Hamamatsu
- Visit Mount Fuji
- Take the Lake Ashi Cruise and Komagatake Ropeway
- Visit Mount Fuji 5th Station

**Day 4:** Osaka
- Visit Nara & Deer Park
- Visit Todaiji Temple
- Free Time at Shinsaibashi

**Day 5:** Osaka
- Visit Kinkakuji Temple
- Visit Arashiyama Bamboo Forest
- Visit Fushimi Inari Shrine

**Day 6:** Osaka
- Day Trip to Hiroshima
- Take the Bullet Train Experience (Osaka – Hiroshima – Osaka)
- Visit Miyajima Island
- Visit Itsukushima Shrine
- Photostop at the Floating Tori Gate
- Photostop at Atomic Dome
- Visit Peace Memorial Park and Museum

**Day 7:** Departure from Kansai airport
- Transfer to Kansai airport for your flight back home (SIC Basis)

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon Special - Mauritius - The Ravenala Attitude' package is a 7-day romantic getaway to the beautiful island of Mauritius. The itinerary includes a city tour, visits to the famous Adamas Diamond Showroom, Floreal Shopping Factory, and Citadel Fort, as well as a full-day tour to Trou Aux Cerfs, a dead volcano crater, and a visit to the Sacred Lake of Grand Bassin. The package also includes a full-day tour to Ile Aux Cerfs, where you can enjoy optional water sport activities, and a departure transfer to the airport. The package is priced at 53673.0 and includes 06 nights stay at The Ravenala Attitude or similar on HB basis, airport/hotel/airport transfers on SIC basis, city tour, full-day Trou Aux Cerfs, full-day Ile Aux Cerfs, English speaking driver cum guide, all transfers and tours by AC vehicle on seat in coach (SIC) basis, travel insurance, and more.

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Adaaran Select Meedhupparu' package is a 5-day romantic getaway to the beautiful island of Maldives. The itinerary includes a relaxing stay at the Adaaran Select Meedhupparu resort, with activities such as snorkeling, diving, and exploring the island's crystal-clear waters and pristine beaches. The package also includes return seaplane transfers, green tax, and travel insurance for the travel duration. Guests will enjoy a luxurious stay in a Deluxe Jacuzzi Beach Villa, with a meal plan as per selection and all-inclusive amenities. The package is perfect for couples looking for a relaxing and romantic getaway in the Maldives.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Maldives
- Arrive in Male and transfer to the Adaaran Select Meedhupparu resort.
- Check-in at the hotel (standard 1400 hrs.) and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2-4:** Relaxation and leisure
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel.
- Spend the day at leisure, exploring the island, snorkeling, diving, or simply relaxing on the beach.

**Day 5:** Departure
- After breakfast, check out (standard 1200 hrs.) and transfer from the hotel to International Airport for the departure flight back to India or to your onwards destination.

**Inclusions:**

- 04 Night’s accommodation in Deluxe Jacuzzi Beach Villa
- Meal Plan as per selection - All Inclusive
- Return Seaplane transfers
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International Airfare & Visa Charges
- Guaranteed early check in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary
- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included

**Highlights of the package:**

- Relaxing stay at the Adaaran Select Meedhupparu resort
- Snorkeling, diving, and exploring the island's crystal-clear waters and pristine beaches
- Return seaplane transfers
- Green tax and travel insurance for the travel duration
- Luxurious stay in a Deluxe Jacuzzi Beach Villa
- All-inclusive meal plan and amenities

**Summary:** The 'Honeymoon Special - Maldives - Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi' package is a 5-day romantic getaway to the beautiful island of Maldives. The itinerary includes a relaxing stay at the Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi resort, with options to upgrade to a Grand Villa or Sunrise Ocean Villa. Enjoy a range of activities, including snorkeling, diving, and exploring the island's crystal-clear waters and pristine beaches. The package also includes return speedboat transfers, green tax, and travel insurance. With its all-inclusive meal plan and luxurious accommodations, this package is perfect for couples looking to escape the hustle and bustle of city life and enjoy a romantic getaway in paradise.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Maldives
- Arrive in Male and transfer to the Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi resort.
- Check-in at the hotel (standard 1400 hrs.) and enjoy the rest of the day at leisure.

**Day 2-4:** Relaxation and Leisure
- Enjoy breakfast at the hotel and spend the day at leisure, exploring the island and its crystal-clear waters.
- Take part in various activities, such as snorkeling, diving, and exploring the island's pristine beaches.

**Day 5:** Departure
- After breakfast, check out (standard 1200 hrs.) and transfer from the hotel to International Airport for the departure flight back to India or to your onwards destination.

**Inclusions:**

- 02 Night’s accommodation in Grand Villa
- 02 Night’s accommodation in Sunrise Ocean Villa
- Meal Plan as per selection – All Inclusive
- Return Speedboat transfers
- Green Tax
- Travel Insurance (up to age of 60 yrs.) for the travel duration

**Exclusions:**

- TCS & GST
- International Airfare & Visa Charges
- Guaranteed early check in or late check-out
- Any expenses of personal nature
- Tips and porterage
- Meals other than that what is mentioned in your itinerary
- Drinks including Water during meals / sightseeing tours are not included

**Highlights of the package:**

- Relaxing stay at the Adaaran Select Hudhuran Fushi resort
- Options to upgrade to a Grand Villa or Sunrise Ocean Villa
- Range of activities, including snorkeling, diving, and exploring the island's crystal-clear waters and pristine beaches
- All-inclusive meal plan and luxurious accommodations
- Return speedboat transfers, green tax, and travel insurance

**Summary:** The 'Enchanting Japan' package is a 9-day tour covering Narita, Tokyo, Hamamatsu, and Osaka. The itinerary includes visits to the Great Buddha of Kamakura, Yamashita Park, Ramen Museum, Shibuya Crossing, Asakusa Kannon Temple, Tokyo Skytree, Mount Fuji, Lake Ashi Cruise, Komagatake Ropeway, Mount Fuji 5th Station, Nara & Deer Park, Todaiji Temple, Shinsaibashi, Kinkakuji Temple, Arashiyama Bamboo Forest, Fushimi Inari Shrine, Hiroshima, Miyajima Island, Itsukushima Shrine, Floating Tori Gate, Atomic Dome, Peace Memorial Park and Museum, Osaka Castle, and Umeda Sky Building, among other attractions. Participants will enjoy guided tours, bullet train rides, and visits to local markets and shopping streets.

**Itinerary:**

**Day 1:** Arrival in Narita
- Arrive at Narita airport and transfer to the hotel by Shuttle Bus (SIC Basis)
- Check-in at the hotel (standard time approx. 1500 hrs)
- The rest of the day is at leisure

**Day 2:** Tokyo
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel
- Visit the Great Buddha of Kamakura, Yamashita Park, Ramen Museum, and Shibuya Crossing (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Tokyo

**Day 3:** Tokyo
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel
- Visit Asakusa Kannon Temple, Tokyo Skytree, and Team Labs (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Tokyo

**Day 4:** Hamamatsu
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel
- Visit Mount Fuji, Lake Ashi Cruise, Komagatake Ropeway, and Mount Fuji 5th Station (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Hamamatsu

**Day 5:** Osaka
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel
- Visit Nara & Deer Park, Todaiji Temple, and Shinsaibashi (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Osaka

**Day 6:** Osaka
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel
- Visit Kinkakuji Temple, Arashiyama Bamboo Forest, and Fushimi Inari Shrine (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Osaka

**Day 7:** Osaka
- Enjoy Packed Breakfast from hotel
- Visit Hiroshima, Miyajima Island, Itsukushima Shrine, Floating Tori Gate, Atomic Dome, Peace Memorial Park and Museum (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Osaka

**Day 8:** Osaka
- Enjoy Breakfast in Hotel
- Visit Osaka Castle and Umeda Sky Building (SIC Basis)
- Overnight stay at Osaka

**Day 9:** Departure from Kansai airport (SIC basis)
- Morning after breakfast; you will be transferred to Kansai airport for your flight back home to India.
